audio_textures.label: Vinyl crackle
audio_textures.description: Adds light crackle and analog warmth for a record-player feeling.
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Add low-volume crackle/noise and gentle high-frequency roll-off.

audio_textures.label: Cassette warmth
audio_textures.description: Softens the audio with tape-like hiss and gentle saturation.
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Add low-volume hiss, slight pitch flutter if available, and gentle compression.

audio_textures.label: FM radio
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Apply mild compression and subtle EQ shaping.

audio_textures.label: Mono radio
audio_textures.description: Older radio-style narrow sound with limited frequency range.
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Convert toward mono and apply band-pass filtering.

audio_textures.label: Club PA
audio_textures.description: Makes the output feel like it is playing through a club sound system.
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Add subtle room reverb and compression.

audio_textures.label: VHS glow
audio_textures.description: A soft, hazy late-80s/90s home-video atmosphere.
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Add soft saturation and mild high-end blur.

audio_textures.label: Early MP3 compression
audio_textures.description: Evokes early digital files and internet-era audio sharing.
audio_textures.post_processing_hint: Use subtle bit-rate style degradation only if it still sounds pleasant.

audio_textures.label: Clean digital master
audio_textures.description: Modern, clean, bright audio with minimal nostalgic artifacts.
